titleStmt.title: SII 41.291: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 291. (A.R. No. 507 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the kitchen in the Jambukēśvara temple, At Tiruvānaikāval at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Incomplete Sale of land, lying in several plots, to the temple of Tiruvāṉaikkā, by one Kāṭṭuḍaiyān Piḷḷāṉ Chēndāṉ, who had kāṇi rights in Vaḷavanallūr a dēvadāna of the same temple and who was also a lease-holder (aḍaippu) of the whole village. The sale was made to pay to Pōyadeṇḍanāyakkar (perhaps the tax collector of the day) the tax arrears that had accumulated over someyears on this land. It is mentioned that this land was in his ownership before he had sold it to one Edirmalaiuḍaiyān Vaḍavāyilnambi alias Maṉṟachchi-pallavaraiyaṉ. The latter person is said to have absconded without paying the tax dues on the sold land, hence the present sale.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉa ccakravattikaṉ rājarājarājarāja = [Picture]tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu mituṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu Ekādaśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ pāṇṭikulā
caṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar tiruvaruḷāl Ivar kaṉmikaḷukku nilavilaiyāvaṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu Iṉnāṭṭu Iṉnā
yaṉār tevatānam vaḷavanallūrk kāṇi Uṭaiyeṉumāy Ivvūrkku Aṭaippumāṉa kāṭṭuṭaiyāṉ piḷḷāṉ centāṉeṉ Ivvūril Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu nāṉum Eṅkaḷ periyatavappaṉār
kāṭṭuuṭaiyār Āḷuṭaiyāṉum kāṇiyāṉa nilattu Etirmalaiuṭaiyāṉ vaṭavāyil nampiyāṉamaṉṟac cippallavaraiyaṉukku muṉṉāḷil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa viḷai nilattukkum puṉcey nilattukkum maṉaika
ḷukkum Ivaṉ muṉṉiṉṟu kaṭamai kuṭimai yiṟāṉamaiyālum Ivviḷainilam puṉceyyumaṉaikaḷum Uṭpaṭa Eṉṉaṭaippile certtu nāṉ Iṟuppittu vantamaiyāl Ivūril Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉakkaṭamai
kku celavāka nellukkuṟuṇikku kācu Āka vilaippaṭikkup puṉceyk kaṭamaikkum celavākap poyateṇṭanāyakkarkku teṉkaraināṭṭu mākkalam Uḷḷiṭṭa kaṭamaikku ce
Uṭpaṭap piṟitta kācu Aimpatiṉāyirattukkume viṉiyokamum policai(t) tuṇṭamum kācu taṇṭaniṉṟa kaṉṉaṭiyar Uḷḷiṭṭārkkup paḻaṅkācum Eṟṟi mārattammaṉum vicayaiyayaṉum
Oṭukkukiṟa kācukku Iṉta Etirimalaiuṭaiyāṉ vaṭavāyil nampi maṉṟaccappallavaraiyaṉ perāl kaṭamaiyāṉa puṉceyk kaṭamai
kācu 100 6 10 5 m nel kaṭamaikku kācu 100 10 2[6 10 8]m Āka kācu patiṉāyirattu 4 100 2 10 3 Ikkācu patiṉāyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Irupattu muṉṟum muṉṉiṉṟu Oṭukkāmaiyil Ivviḷai nilattukkum puṉcey nilattukkum maṉai
kaḷukkum pūrvasvāmi nāṉeṉṟum Eṉ Aṭaippile certtu Ivaṉ kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟāte Uṭalaḻittup pokaiyil Ikkācu Eṉakkupparamāy Iṟukka veṇṭukaiyil Inta malaiuṭai
yāṉ vaṭavāyil nampiyāṉa maṉṟaccappallavaraiyaṉ kāṇiyāṉa tukkaicuvāmi Eṉṟu perkūvapaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai pāṇṭiyarāyar kāṇiyāṉanarikkuṭaiyāṉ paḷḷikku meṟkum teṉpā
ṟkellai tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ vāykkālukkum melpāṟkellai maḻavatarayar kāṇi veppañceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉ vāykkālukku
cainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiuḷnaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam4māmukkāṇi Iṉṉilam nāṉmāvaraiyum Īḻakkuṭaiyāṉ paḷḷa pāṇṭiyarāyar kkuṭaiyāṉ paḷḷattukku kiḻakkum teṉpāṟke
llai tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakku mipāṟkellaiviṟkiṉṟa tukkaicuvāmi nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉ vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷai nilam Orumākāṇi ¿
Iṉṉilam mākāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum cūṉimāṉcey Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai virāṭarāyar kāṇi caṭaiya kkum teṉpāṟkellai maḻavatarayar kāṇi ñceykku
vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai viṟkiṉṟāṉ cotiyāḻvāṉ nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai koyil vāykkālukku naṭuvupaṭṭa kāṇiyum coti
yāḻvār cey Eṉṟu peṟkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻapāṟkkellai laikeṅkaiko kellai
maḻavatarayar kāṇi piṭāriceykku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai piṭārikoyil vākkālu
Digital edition of SII 41.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
